query:
UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Haa Alifu Atoll is the northernmost atoll of the Maldives, offering pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic local island experiences. This remote atoll provides a unique blend of natural beauty and Maldivian culture.',
  overview = 'Haa Alifu Atoll is the northernmost atoll with pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic local island experiences.'
WHERE name = 'Haa Alifu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll is a northern atoll offering pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic Maldivian culture. The atoll features pristine coral reefs and abundant marine life.',
  overview = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll is a northern atoll with pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic Maldivian experiences.'
WHERE name = 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Shaviyani Atoll is a northern atoll offering pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic local island experiences. The atoll features pristine coral reefs and abundant marine biodiversity.',
  overview = 'Shaviyani Atoll is a northern atoll with pristine beaches and excellent diving conditions.'
WHERE name = 'Shaviyani Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Noonu Atoll is a northern atoll featuring pristine coral reefs, excellent diving and snorkeling, and authentic local island experiences. The atoll offers a more secluded experience away from the crowds.',
  overview = 'Noonu Atoll is a northern atoll with pristine coral reefs and excellent diving conditions in a secluded setting.'
WHERE name = 'Noonu Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Raa Atoll is a northern atoll offering pristine beaches, excellent diving, and authentic Maldivian culture. The atoll features pristine coral reefs and abundant marine life.',
  overview = 'Raa Atoll is a northern atoll with pristine beaches and excellent diving conditions.'
WHERE name = 'Raa Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Lhaviyani Atoll is a northern atoll offering pristine beaches, excellent diving and snorkeling, and a mix of luxury resorts and local islands. The atoll features pristine coral reefs and abundant marine biodiversity.',
  overview = 'Lhaviyani Atoll is a northern atoll with pristine beaches and excellent diving and snorkeling conditions.'
WHERE name = 'Lhaviyani Atoll';

UPDATE atolls SET 
  description = 'Kaafu Atoll is the central atoll of the Maldives, home to the capital city Malé. This atoll offers the most accessibility and features a mix of luxury resorts, local islands, and urban experiences.',
  overview = 'Kaafu Atoll is the central atoll of the Maldives, home to the capital city Malé, offering excellent accessibility and diverse experiences.'
WHERE name = 'Kaafu Atoll';
